name: node-ansi-regex
title: node-ansi-regex
summary: regular expression for matching ANSI escape codes
description:
regular expression for matching ANSI escape codes
This module provides a regular expression for matching ANSI
escape codes.
.
This modules small package char-regex that
match any full character, considering weird character ranges.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-ansi-regex because regular expression for matching ANSI escape codes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-ansi-regex as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-ansi-regex with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-ansi-regex --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
